title: CachingStore: lock never held across .await — document and preserve
description: secretx-cache/src/lib.rs uses explicit block scopes to release the tokio::sync::Mutex before every await point. The design decision is stated in the module doc ('The internal Mutex is never held across an .await point'). A well-intentioned contributor might try to simplify by holding the lock through the fetch. That would introduce lock contention across network calls and serialize all concurrent gets — a correctness-level liveness issue with a subtle failure mode. The current approach is correct and should be defended.
